subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Us unto him who hath sought the face of God, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the Omnipotent, that he may render thanks unto God, his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدنا الی الذی اراد وجه الله المقتدر العزیز القدیر لیشکر الله ربه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @being a source of light; guidance, @high station of the true believer, @purpose; goal of creation, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
